sentences.target: Ich übe heute Flöte im Wohnzimmer.

translations.de: Ich übe heute Flöte im Wohnzimmer.
translations.en: I’m practicing the flute today in the living room.
translations.es: Hoy practico la flauta en la sala de estar.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, je travaille la flûte dans le salon.
translations.it: Oggi mi esercito al flauto in salotto.
translations.ru: Сегодня я занимаюсь на флейте в гостиной.
translations.pt: Hoje pratico flauta na sala de estar.
translations.he: היום אני מתאמן על החליל בסלון.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi tập sáo trong phòng khách.
translations.ar: اليوم أتدرب على الفلوت في غرفة الجلوس.
translations.nl: Vandaag oefen ik op de fluit in de woonkamer.
translations.uk: Сьогодні я тренуюся на флейті у вітальні.
translations.hu: Ma a nappaliban gyakorlok a fuvolán.
translations.hi: आज मैं बैठक में बाँसुरी का अभ्यास कर रहा हूँ।
translations.pl: Dziś ćwiczę grę na flecie w salonie.
translations.el: Σήμερα εξασκούμαι στο φλάουτο στο σαλόνι.
translations.nb: I dag øver jeg på fløyte i stua.
translations.id: Hari ini aku berlatih seruling di ruang tamu.
translations.sv: I dag övar jag på flöjt i vardagsrummet.
translations.ro: Astăzi exersez la flaut în sufragerie.
translations.cs: Dnes cvičím na flétnu v obýváku.
translations.da: I dag øver jeg på fløjte i stuen.
translations.ja: 今日はリビングでフルートを練習します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative; 1st person singular; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb; present indicative, 1st person singular; governs the object 'Flöte' and the locative PP.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.
Common noun, feminine singular; accusative direct object (bare noun) of 'übe'.
Preposition contracted with definite article ('in dem'); introduces a dative PP indicating location.
Common noun, neuter singular; dative object of 'im'; denotes the location.

sentences.target: Meine Schwester spielt seit Jahren Flöte.

translations.de: Meine Schwester spielt seit Jahren Flöte.
translations.en: My sister has played the flute for years.
translations.es: Mi hermana toca la flauta desde hace años.
translations.fr: Ma sœur joue de la flûte depuis des années.
translations.it: Mia sorella suona il flauto da anni.
translations.ko: 제 여동생은 몇 년째 플루트를 연주하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我妹妹吹长笛已经很多年了。
translations.yue: 我妹妹吹長笛已經好多年喇。
translations.ru: Моя сестра играет на флейте уже много лет.
translations.pt: Minha irmã toca flauta há anos.
translations.vi: Em gái tôi đã thổi sáo nhiều năm rồi.
translations.ar: أختي تعزف على الفلوت منذ سنوات.
translations.nl: Mijn zus speelt al jaren fluit.
translations.uk: Моя сестра грає на флейті вже багато років.
translations.hi: मेरी बहन कई सालों से बांसुरी बजा रही है।
translations.pl: Moja siostra gra na flecie od lat.
translations.el: Η αδελφή μου παίζει φλάουτο εδώ και χρόνια.
translations.nb: Søsteren min har spilt fløyte i mange år.
translations.id: Adik perempuan saya sudah bermain seruling selama bertahun-tahun.
translations.sv: Min syster har spelat flöjt i många år.
translations.ro: Sora mea cântă la flaut de ani de zile.
translations.cs: Moje sestra hraje na flétnu už léta.
translations.da: Min søster har spillet fløjte i mange år.
translations.fi: Siskoni on soittanut huilua jo vuosia.
translations.ja: 妹は何年もフルートを演奏しています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; feminine singular nominative; modifies 'Schwester'.
Common noun, feminine singular; nominative subject of 'spielt'.
Finite main verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes the bare object 'Flöte' and PP 'seit Jahren'.
Preposition selecting dative; introduces a duration PP.
Common noun, plural dative; object of 'seit'; expresses the duration.
Common noun, feminine singular; accusative bare object of 'spielt'.

translations.vi: Bạn đã cất cây sáo rồi.
translations.uk: Ти поклав свою флейту в футляр.
translations.hi: तुमने अपनी बांसुरी बैग में रख ली।
translations.el: Έβαλες το φλάουτο σου στην τσάντα.
translations.id: Kamu sudah memasukkan serulingmu ke dalam tas.
translations.sv: Du har packat ner din flöjt.
translations.ja: フルートをバッグに入れました。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative; 2nd person singular; subject of the clause.
Auxiliary verb; present indicative, 2nd person singular; forms the Perfekt with the participle 'eingepackt'.
Possessive determiner; feminine singular accusative; modifies 'Flöte'.
Common noun, feminine singular; accusative direct object (theme).
Past participle of the separable verb 'einpacken'; complements 'hast' to form the Perfekt; prefix 'ein-' is attached in the participle (not split).

sentences.target: Die Flöte klingt heute besonders schön.

translations.de: Die Flöte klingt heute besonders schön.
translations.en: The flute sounds especially beautiful today.
translations.es: Hoy la flauta suena especialmente bonita.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, la flûte sonne particulièrement bien.
translations.it: Oggi il flauto suona particolarmente bene.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天长笛的音色格外动听。
translations.yue: 今日長笛嘅音色特別好聽。
translations.pt: Hoje a flauta soa especialmente bem.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tiếng sáo nghe đặc biệt hay.
translations.ar: اليوم صوت الفلوت جميل بشكل خاص.
translations.nl: Vandaag klinkt de fluit bijzonder mooi.
translations.hu: Ma a fuvoлa különösen szépen szól.
translations.hi: आज बांसुरी की ध्वनि खास तौर पर सुंदर लग रही है।
translations.el: Σήμερα το φλάουτο ακούγεται ιδιαίτερα όμορφα.
translations.nb: I dag låter fløyta spesielt fint.
translations.id: Hari ini suara seruling terdengar sangat indah.
translations.sv: I dag låter flöjten särskilt vacker.
translations.ro: Astăzi flautul sună deosebit de frumos.
translations.da: I dag lyder fløjten særligt smukt.
translations.ja: 今日はフルートの音色が特に美しく響いています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine singular nominative; modifies 'Flöte'.
Common noun, feminine singular; nominative subject of 'klingt'.
Intransitive finite verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular; links to the predicative adjective 'schön'.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.
Degree adverb intensifying the adjective 'schön'.
Predicative adjective complement describing how the subject sounds.

Die Flöte klingt heute besonders schön.

My sister has played the flute for years.
The flute sounds especially beautiful today.
